name: archive-blocks
description: A WordPress Gutenberg block for displaying monthly post archives in a compact format
author: David Gilbert

scripts.zip: npm run build && cd .. && zip -r archive-blocks.zip archive-blocks -x '*.DS_Store' -x 'archive-blocks/node_modules/*' -x 'archive-blocks/src/*' -x 'archive-blocks/package*.json' -x 'archive-blocks/.claude/*' -x 'archive-blocks/CLAUDE.md'
